title: Creamy Plum Tea Sandwich
description: A classic British-inspired tea sandwich filled with fresh plum and creamy cheese.
instructions: 2. Slice the bread into thin pieces.
3. Spread a layer of plum jam on each bread slice.
4. In a separate bowl, mix the cream cheese until smooth.
5. Add sliced plums to the cream cheese and mix until well combined.
6. Spread the cream cheese mixture on top of the plum jam.
7. Place a layer of sliced bread on top of the cream cheese mixture.
8. Cut the sandwiches into desired shapes using a cookie cutter or a knife.
9. Place the sandwiches on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
10. Bake the sandwiches in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes or until lightly toasted.
11. Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
12. Serve the sandwiches warm with a side of fresh mint leaves.
